description_long: This is a tall, clear glass tumbler filled with a creamy, light-colored milkshake. The glass is cylindrical and transparent, allowing the contents to be seen from all sides. A white straw is inserted into the drink, and a fresh orange slice is perched on the rim, adding a decorative and refreshing touch. The milkshake appears smooth and thick, with no visible toppings such as whipped cream or sprinkles. The glass has a glossy, reflective surface, and the orange slice provides a vibrant contrast to the otherwise neutral tones. There are no visible logos, branding, or text on the glass.
description: A tall, clear glass tumbler filled with a creamy milkshake, garnished with an orange slice and a white straw.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass tumbler with the straw centered and no visible orange slice.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the orange slice garnish on the rim and the white straw angled to the side.
description_view_2: Rear view with the straw visible and no orange slice in sight.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing both the orange slice and the white straw clearly.
